provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, large human male in his 30s with a broken nose reset badly and a neck tattoo of a ship registry crossed out, wearing heavy salvaged Veshan plate armor on the torso only with bare arms showing muscular scarred skin, Compact regulation trousers cut short at the knee, improvised shin guards made from hull plating strapped on with cable ties, a sawed-off shotgun-style weapon welded from pipe, this is the person who collects debts in the Reach
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy, superhero, symmetrical matching armor

judgment.explanation: Sable Reach outlaw. Salvaged, stolen, and improvised gear. Nothing matches, nothing is new, everything tells a survival story.
